properties.titulo_evento: 250 years of US independence: How France helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War

properties.titulo_evento: Pope defends migrants on symbolic visit to key immigration hub Lampedusa

properties.titulo_evento: Kielce pogrom in Poland: 80th anniversary of 1946 massacre
